title: Bug Report: Property string with quote parse failed
body:
reproducible in https://github.com/sequencer/om-bug: `nix build gcd.rtl`

non-nix, install mill and circt, clone chisel into `dependencies/chisel` dir:

- generate config:
```bash
mill elaborator.runMain org.chipsalliance.gcd.elaborator.GCDMain config --width 32 --useAsyncReset false --target-dir ./
```

`./GCD.json` will be generated

- generate FIRRTL:
```bash
mill elaborator.runMain org.chipsalliance.gcd.elaborator.GCDMain design --parameter ./GCD.json
```

`./GCD.fir` will be generated
```fir
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit GCD :
  layer Verification, bind, "Verification" :
    layer Assert, bind, "Verification/Assert" :
    layer Assume, bind, "Verification/Assume" :
    layer Cover, bind, "Verification/Cover" :
  class GCDOM : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 29:2]
    output width : Integer @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 31:44]
    output useAsyncReset : Bool @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 32:44]
    output generator : String @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 33:44]

    propassign width, Integer(32) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 34:17]
    propassign useAsyncReset, Bool(false) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 35:17]
    propassign generator, String("{"parameter":{"width":32,"useAsyncReset":false},"generator":"org.chipsalliance.gcd.GCD"}") @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 36:17]

  public module GCD : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 53:2]
    input clock : Clock @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    input reset : UInt<1> @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    input input : { flip ready : UInt<1>, valid : UInt<1>, bits : { x : UInt<32>, y : UInt<32>}} @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output output : { valid : UInt<1>, bits : UInt<32>} @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output probe : Probe<{ busy : UInt<1>}, Verification> @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output om : AnyRef @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]

    reg x : UInt<32>, clock @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 62:20]
    regreset y : UInt<32>, clock, reset, UInt<1>(0h0) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 64:24]
    regreset startupFlag : UInt<1>, clock, reset, UInt<1>(0h0) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 65:28]
    node busy = neq(y, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 66:23]
    node _T = gt(x, y) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:10]
    when _T : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:15]
      node _x_T = sub(x, y) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:24]
      node _x_T_1 = tail(_x_T, 1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:24]
      connect x, _x_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:19]
    else :
      node _y_T = sub(y, x) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:49]
      node _y_T_1 = tail(_y_T, 1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:49]
      connect y, _y_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:44]
    node _T_1 = and(input.ready, input.valid) @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/util/Decoupled.scala 51:35]
    when _T_1 : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 70:23]
      connect x, input.bits.x @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 71:17]
      connect y, input.bits.y @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 72:17]
      connect startupFlag, UInt<1>(0h1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 73:17]
    node _view__input_ready_T = eq(busy, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 76:22]
    connect input.ready, _view__input_ready_T @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 76:19]
    connect output.bits, x @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 77:19]
    node _view__output_valid_T = eq(busy, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:37]
    node _view__output_valid_T_1 = and(startupFlag, _view__output_valid_T) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:34]
    connect output.valid, _view__output_valid_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:19]
    wire probeWire : { busy : UInt<1>} @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 81:33]
    define probe = probe(probeWire) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 82:9]
    connect probeWire.busy, busy @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 83:18]
    object omInstance of GCDOM @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 86:48]
    propassign om, omInstance @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 87:9]
```

parse into mlir:
```
firtool --parse-only ./GCD.fir
./GCD.fir:14:37: error: expected ')' in String expression
    propassign generator, String("{"parameter":{"width":32,"useAsyncReset":false},"generator":"org.chipsalliance.gcd.GCD"}") @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 36:17]
                                    ^
```

The X-Problem is we are encoding the generator configuration for module-level reproducibility check, which need to encode the json string into OM.
code_blocks:
mill elaborator.runMain org.chipsalliance.gcd.elaborator.GCDMain config --width 32 --useAsyncReset false --target-dir ./
mill elaborator.runMain org.chipsalliance.gcd.elaborator.GCDMain design --parameter ./GCD.json
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit GCD :
  layer Verification, bind, "Verification" :
    layer Assert, bind, "Verification/Assert" :
    layer Assume, bind, "Verification/Assume" :
    layer Cover, bind, "Verification/Cover" :
  class GCDOM : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 29:2]
    output width : Integer @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 31:44]
    output useAsyncReset : Bool @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 32:44]
    output generator : String @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 33:44]

    propassign width, Integer(32) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 34:17]
    propassign useAsyncReset, Bool(false) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 35:17]
    propassign generator, String("{"parameter":{"width":32,"useAsyncReset":false},"generator":"org.chipsalliance.gcd.GCD"}") @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 36:17]

  public module GCD : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 53:2]
    input clock : Clock @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    input reset : UInt<1> @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    input input : { flip ready : UInt<1>, valid : UInt<1>, bits : { x : UInt<32>, y : UInt<32>}} @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output output : { valid : UInt<1>, bits : UInt<32>} @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output probe : Probe<{ busy : UInt<1>}, Verification> @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]
    output om : AnyRef @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/FixedIOModule.scala 19:24]

    reg x : UInt<32>, clock @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 62:20]
    regreset y : UInt<32>, clock, reset, UInt<1>(0h0) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 64:24]
    regreset startupFlag : UInt<1>, clock, reset, UInt<1>(0h0) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 65:28]
    node busy = neq(y, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 66:23]
    node _T = gt(x, y) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:10]
    when _T : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:15]
      node _x_T = sub(x, y) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:24]
      node _x_T_1 = tail(_x_T, 1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:24]
      connect x, _x_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:19]
    else :
      node _y_T = sub(y, x) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:49]
      node _y_T_1 = tail(_y_T, 1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:49]
      connect y, _y_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 68:44]
    node _T_1 = and(input.ready, input.valid) @[nix/store/ycnqnl9v2hqa0b739f6m23j6vnbc7aby-source/src/main/scala/chisel3/util/Decoupled.scala 51:35]
    when _T_1 : @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 70:23]
      connect x, input.bits.x @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 71:17]
      connect y, input.bits.y @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 72:17]
      connect startupFlag, UInt<1>(0h1) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 73:17]
    node _view__input_ready_T = eq(busy, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 76:22]
    connect input.ready, _view__input_ready_T @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 76:19]
    connect output.bits, x @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 77:19]
    node _view__output_valid_T = eq(busy, UInt<1>(0h0)) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:37]
    node _view__output_valid_T_1 = and(startupFlag, _view__output_valid_T) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:34]
    connect output.valid, _view__output_valid_T_1 @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 78:19]
    wire probeWire : { busy : UInt<1>} @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 81:33]
    define probe = probe(probeWire) @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 82:9]
    connect probeWire.busy, busy @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 83:18]
    object omInstance of GCDOM @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 86:48]
    propassign om, omInstance @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 87:9]
firtool --parse-only ./GCD.fir
./GCD.fir:14:37: error: expected ')' in String expression
    propassign generator, String("{"parameter":{"width":32,"useAsyncReset":false},"generator":"org.chipsalliance.gcd.GCD"}") @[gcd/src/GCD.scala 36:17]
                                    ^
